title: CallLint Static Toxic-Flow
description: A static toxic-flow path (calllint.flow.v0) over sealed Authority Manifest(s): a trust-classified data source, ordered steps, and a terminal sink expressing a cross-tool composition (e.g. untrusted public content -> read a secret -> send to an external sink). It is NOT a second verdict - its decisionHint is folded into calllint.decision.v0 as reasons; the scan/gateway verdict stays SAFE/REVIEW/BLOCK/UNKNOWN. steps[]/sink use the shipped closed action (9) x resource (10) authority vocabulary ONLY. Fully deterministic; the target is never executed; digest = sha256 over this object minus its own digest field. See ADR 0040 / 0041.

flowId.description: Stable, human-legible id for the path shape (e.g. "flow:public-read-to-external-send"). Not unique per instance; the same shape across artifacts shares the id and the digest seals the concrete instance.

source.description: The trust-classified data source at the head of the path.

trustSource.description: Trust class of the source data (ADR 0041). "unknown" never reads as trusted (I-04).

evidence.description: Exact provenance bytes that grounded the source classification. Never empty.

steps.description: Ordered intermediate steps of the path (shipped authority vocabulary only). May be empty.

scope.description: Where the authority applies (a path, host, scope string); null when unbounded/unknown.

sink.description: The terminal sink where data would leave.

destination.description: Outbound destination (host/URL) for send/connect sinks; null when unknown/unbounded.

class.description: Coarse risk class of the composition.

severity.description: Normalized 0..100 severity; deterministic function of (class, hint).

decisionHint.description: A HINT folded into calllint.decision.v0 reasons - NOT a second verdict (ADR 0040 section 1).

evidence.description: Exact bytes grounding the flow. Mandatory - a flow is never unsourced (I-07).

authorityDigests.description: Digests of the Authority Manifest(s) analyzed to produce this flow (sorted, deduped).

digest.description: sha256 over this object minus its own digest field (hashJson).
